elements.name: Complete DSA Portal to Jarvis Portal Handoff using Context Bridge

steps.name: User switches to Jarvis portal and logins
User navigates to the Applications tab searches appFrom using "Partner LID" and opens the appform
User opens the Loan Requirements section and updates the details

steps.name: User moves application to "Move to Credit Approval" assigned to level "L5" and user "tenjin.user@creditsaison-in.com"
User navigates to the RegCheck tab in Application Dashboard
User updates the Appform Ownership Details with the following data:
User opens the Loan Requirements section and initiates Credit Approval with reason "Approve"
User opens E-Sign section, generates documents, and opts for offline signatures
User opens Insurance Details and updates Insurance and Nominee Details with the following data
User selects "Move to Sanction Approval" from Application Actions and moves appForm next stage
